required_items.title: Business goal/problem statement
required_items.description: Clear statement of customer or business problem and expected outcome.

required_items.title: Target users/personas
required_items.description: Who is affected and who receives value.

required_items.title: Scope boundaries
required_items.description: In-scope and out-of-scope for this release.

required_items.title: Dependencies and constraints
required_items.description: External dependencies, technical constraints, or blockers.

required_items.title: Success metrics
required_items.description: How success is measured after release.

required_items.title: Rollout/release expectation
required_items.description: Release strategy, rollout phases, and risk handling.
